角色养成 Character Building

2026年5月开服角色培养优先级：S级自选、娜娜莉、九原与常驻队伍怎么练 May 2026 Launch Character Priority: S-Rank Selector, Nanally, Jiuyuan and Stable Teams

发布时间：Published: 2026-05-24 作者：异环攻略站编辑部Author: NTE Guide Editorial Team 阅读时间：12 分钟Read time: 12 min

攻略速览

2026 年 5 月的开服环境里，账号强度主要取决于是否尽快形成一套完整队伍，而不是抽到多少个 S 级角色。娜娜莉、九原这类能直接改善输出或对群体验的角色优先级较高，但真正影响体验的是资源集中度、队伍分工和技能升级顺序。

前置条件与接取方式

适用玩家

开服入坑、S级自选未使用或刚完成主线解锁的玩家

判断标准

能否稳定清日常、材料本、异象委托和主要探索战斗

资源原则

先练一队，再补第二队；先主C，再关键功能位

培养优先级

避免平均培养

1

先确定主C

娜娜莉、小吱、白藏等能站场输出的角色优先

主C决定大部分关卡的通关速度。开荒期只要主C等级、武器和核心技能领先，队伍整体体验会明显好于多个角色平均升级。

2

补强副C和聚怪位

九原这类速切副C能显著提升对群效率

很多开放世界战斗的难点不是单体血量，而是敌人分散导致技能空转。聚怪、挂标记和速切爆发能让主C输出完整命中。

3

配置生存位

护盾、治疗或减伤角色至少保留一名

高难、BOSS和异象委托中，生存位能减少复活、跑图和重开的时间成本。输出够用后，生存稳定性就是效率。

4

技能升级按收益排序

主C核心输出技能优先，副C大招或功能技能次之

技能材料前期非常紧张。不要看到可升级就点满，先判断该技能是否直接影响循环、伤害或关键控制。

5

第二队延后建设

除非玩法强制双队，否则第二队先停在可用线

第二队需要完整资源链支撑。开服第一个月更推荐把一队推到稳定状态，再用溢出材料补第二套体系。

培养误区

角色多但都不成型

抽到多个高稀有度角色并不等于账号强。没有等级、技能、武器和词条支撑的 S 级角色，实战表现往往不如成型 SR 或主角体系。

  • S级自选优先补队伍缺口，不要只按单人强度选择。
  • 主C未成型前，不要把大量技能书投入低上场率角色。
  • 副词条追求应放在主属性正确之后，前期开荒不需要完美毕业。

完成奖励

主C成型 副C聚怪 生存稳定 材料节省 开荒效率

5 月环境下最稳的培养路线是主C领先、副C补功能、生存位兜底。等一队能稳定清日常和活动后，再根据 1.1 新信息决定第二队和深度投资。

完整解析

很多开服玩家会把培养问题简化成“哪个 S 最强”。实际体验里，单个角色强度只是一部分，队伍结构和资源集中度更重要。一个 80% 成型的完整队伍，通常比三个 40% 成型的高稀有度角色更好用。

如果你选择娜娜莉作为核心，就要优先保证她的站场输出条件，包括普攻相关技能、适合的弧盘、灵属性伤害和暴击体系。九原则更适合作为聚怪与速切副C，在对群场景中放大娜娜莉或其他主C的输出收益。

S级自选建议看缺口。如果你缺主C，自选主C；缺对群与副C，优先考虑九原这类功能输出；如果已经有稳定输出但高难频繁暴毙，生存位和护盾位的价值会被低估。不要把自选当作收藏补图鉴，它应该解决当前账号最卡手的问题。

开服第一个月不建议追求所有角色毕业。正确主属性、核心技能等级和基础循环顺畅，比副词条极限更重要。等版本稳定、角色池扩展后，再回头给主力刷高质量词条，收益会更明确。

Guide Snapshot

In the May 2026 launch environment, account strength depends more on forming one complete team quickly than on owning many S-rank characters. Nanally and Jiuyuan are high-value because they improve output or multi-target flow, but the real difference comes from resource focus, clear team roles and correct skill priority.

Requirements and Entry

Target players

Launch players, unused S-rank selector users and players who just unlocked core systems

Evaluation standard

Can the team clear dailies, material stages, anomaly commissions and exploration fights?

Resource rule

Build one team first, then a second team; main DPS first, then key utility

Investment Priority

Avoid even investment

1

Choose the main DPS first

Nanally, Xiaozhi, Bai Cang and other on-field carries take priority.

The main DPS determines clear speed. During progression, one over-leveled carry feels better than several evenly raised characters.

2

Add sub-DPS and grouping

Jiuyuan-style quick-swap grouping improves multi-target fights.

Many overworld fights are hard because enemies spread out. Grouping, marking and burst support let the main carry hit the full rotation.

3

Keep a survival slot

Bring at least one shield, healer or damage-reduction character.

In bosses and anomaly commissions, survival saves revive time and resets. Once damage is enough, stability becomes efficiency.

4

Upgrade skills by value

Main DPS core skills first; sub-DPS finisher or utility skills second.

Skill books are tight early. Upgrade only skills that directly affect rotation, damage, control or survival.

5

Delay the second team

Unless content requires two teams, keep the second team at a usable line.

A second team needs a full resource chain. During the first month, finish the first team before spreading materials.

Investment Trap

Many characters, no complete unit

Multiple high-rarity pulls do not equal a strong account. Without levels, skills, weapons and usable stats, an S-rank character can perform worse than a finished lower-rarity unit.

  • Use the S-rank selector to fix a team gap, not only to pick a popular solo unit.
  • Do not spend many skill books on low-field-time characters before the main DPS is ready.
  • Correct main stats matter before perfect sub-stats during progression.

Rewards

Finished main DPS Grouping sub-DPS Stable survival Saved materials Faster progression

The safest May route is main DPS ahead, sub-DPS for function, survival as insurance. Once one team clears dailies and events consistently, use 1.1 information to decide second-team and deep-investment plans.

Full Analysis

New players often ask which S-rank is strongest, but practical performance depends more on team structure and resource concentration. One 80% finished team usually beats three 40% finished high-rarity characters.

If Nanally is your core, support her on-field basic-attack cycle with Spirit damage, crit and teammates who group enemies. Jiuyuan is a strong partner because she improves multi-target consistency.

The S-rank selector should solve the current account problem. Pick a main DPS if you lack damage, a grouping or sub-DPS unit if wave clear is weak, or a survival slot if hard content keeps killing the team.

Do not chase full graduation for every character in the first month. Correct main stats, core skill levels and smooth rotations are more important than perfect sub-stats.
